_comment: exp_014 — rescue v2. Single-variable swap from exp_013: rescue model base Thinking-2507 → exp_009 GRPO model. Tests exp_013's lesson: 'free-form rescue is capability-limited, not budget-limited.' If the GRPO model rescues meaningfully more free-form (target +0.5pp local FF), capability hypothesis confirmed and we sweep rescuer further. If flat, rescue saturated — pivot.

rescue._model_id_note: exp_009 GRPO LoRA merged with Thinking-2507 base; single 8GB safetensors, vLLM-loadable directly.

notes: Identical to exp_013 except rescue.model_id. Same rescue prompts, same source data (exp_009 missing_boxed), same token budget, same vLLM sizing. If MCQ rescue regresses vs exp_013 (likely: GRPO model less obedient to 'output ONLY the letter'), the next experiment is per-segment routing — base for MCQ, GRPO for free-form. That requires notebook changes; this experiment is the cheap test first.
